---
title: ""
toc: false
comments: false
---

<!-- Links use the GitHub Pages project base path (/CroAIcon/). On a local
     `quarto preview` (served at /) they will not resolve; that is expected. -->

```{=html}
<div class="cro-404">
  <div class="cro-404-num">404</div>
  <div class="cro-404-term">$ GET <span class="path">/analiza/nepoznato</span> → <span class="code">404</span><span class="cursor"></span></div>
  <p>Tražena putanja ne postoji u indeksu. Serija je možda preimenovana ili
  premještena. Vratite se na popis analiza i pokušajte odande.</p>
  <div class="cro-404-cta">
    <a class="cro-btn" href="/CroAIcon/">← Na popis analiza</a>
    <a class="cro-btn-outline" href="/CroAIcon/podaci.html">Podaci</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
